subtitle: A business-first analyst profile built around clarity, measurable impact, and reliable reporting systems.
paragraphs: I specialize in turning fragmented business questions into structured analysis, reliable reporting, and decision-ready insights. My experience spans healthcare analytics, enterprise consulting, KPI design, data validation, and dashboard delivery.

I work comfortably between technical teams and business stakeholders: gathering requirements, modeling data, building Power BI and Tableau reporting, automating recurring workflows, and explaining the story behind the numbers in clear language.
